name: Triple Chocolate Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together sugar, cocoa powder, cornstarch, and salt until well combined.
2. Gradually whisk in milk while continuously stirring to avoid lumps.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan and stir over medium heat, constantly whisking until it thickens and boils.
4. Continue cooking for 1 minute after boiling, then remove from heat.
5. Stir in bittersweet chocolate and vanilla extract.
6. Allow the pudding to cool by stirring it over an ice bath.
7. Once cooled, fold in shaved white chocolate.
8. Pour the pudding into serving cups.
Yield: 9 servings
